title: Bridge Essay: Brain-body interactions associated with the transition from mind wandering to aw

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Phase Body-energy bridge-v3 targeted acquisition.

**Brain-body interactions associated with the transition from mind wandering to awareness of its occurrence.** — Neuroscience of consciousness (2025). PMID: 41404384. DOI: 10.1093/nc/niaf059. Score: 45. Our thoughts are inherently dynamic and often wander far from our current situation (mind wandering, MW). Although previous research revealed that brain regions involved in arousal regulation modulate neural dynamics to facilitate the transition from MW to the awareness of its occurrence, the specific physiological states and afferent signals underlying this process remain unclear.
